name: factorylm-context
description: Read-only FactoryLM context workflows for external AI development.

interface.shortDescription: Query approved FactoryLM factory context safely.
interface.longDescription: Private/internal Codex plugin package for the FactoryLM context bridge. Bundles the coding-agent skill for read-only asset, UNS, evidence, tag, live-value, and SimLab context access. MCP server configuration will be added after the local MCP wrapper is implemented.
defaultPrompt: Find approved evidence for this asset.
